programme.title: Au Revoir
programme.desc: A competitive family legacy, a brotherly rivalry that fuelled his rise, and a last act on the water. Au Revoir is the wakeboarding ride of a lifetime as Raph Derome retires from the competitive sport.
programme.series-desc: The story of wake-boarding champion Raph Derome as he retires from riding in front of crowds and cameras.

programme.title: Saya Sakakibara: Ride to Redemption
programme.sub-title: From heartbreak to glory: One BMX racer's comeback
programme.desc: The life, career and resilience of BMX athlete Saya Sakakibara. After her brother Kai’s life-altering injury, Saya is determined to honour his legacy and achieve success as she prepares for Paris.
programme.series-desc: After her brother’s injury, BMX athlete Saya Sakakibara pushes for success on her road to Paris.

programme.title: CEB: A Major Comeback
programme.sub-title: Answering the Dota 2 call for a monumental comeback
programme.desc: Sébastien Debs', a retired French pro Dota 2 player, returns to step in for an ESL One Stockholm Major. Can the legendary player drive his team to esports tournament victory for an incredible comeback?
programme.series-desc: Dota 2 player Sébastien Debs returns from retirement to help his team win at an ESL One Stockholm Major.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From skateboarding out a plane to 180m wall climb
programme.desc: Touring a town in style on a snowmobile. Freerunning through an airport. Skateboarding out of a flying plane. Ice climbing Niagra Falls. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from freerunning through an airport to building a skatepark in the forest.

programme.title: A Biker's Ballad
programme.sub-title: Exploring MTB’s roots: A must-see for every rider
programme.desc: 14 riders. 7 years. This mountain biking epic takes a two-wheeled journey back to where the sport began in Crested Butte, Colorado, to celebrate its deep-rooted culture.
programme.series-desc: Traversing the history as well as the trails, 14 riders uncover the essence of MTB in Crested Butte, Colorado.

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: A close and personal look at some of Peru's workers who take their lives into their own hands to eke out a living from the country's natural resources.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.title: The Bottom Line

programme.series-desc: The Bottom Line is a business discussion programme broadcast in the UK on BBC Radio 4 and the BBC News Channel, and internationally on the BBC World Service and BBC World News. It is co-production between BBC News and The Open University.

programme.title: earthrise - We Are Nature
programme.desc: earthrise follows the progress of Al Mizan, an Islamic Covenant for the Earth, and traces its growing impact in the year after its launch.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Today on The Stream: We look at loneliness in the digital world, where everyone is connected but no one is connecting.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: In France, Caroline Darian prepares for the trial of her father who committed horrific crimes against her mother, Gisele Pelicot.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

Each half-hour programme features one investigative documentaries on an issue related to power from around the world. The programme occasionally has one hour specials.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: We look at sixteen-year-olds who are set to be given the right to vote in the UK. Supporters believe this change will empower the new generation.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A Maasai human rights lawyer fights to stop the evictions of his people from their homelands in Tanzania.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Drivers in Afghanistan brave 5,000 metre-high passes in freezing temperatures to deliver basic goods to the isolated inhabitants of the Wakhan corridor.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Drivers in Afghanistan brave 5,000 metre-high passes in freezing temperatures to deliver basic goods to the isolated inhabitants of the Wakhan corridor.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: We look at sixteen-year-olds who are set to be given the right to vote in the UK. Supporters believe this change will empower the new generation.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: Inspirational and provocative stories providing a fresh and informative insight into the world's key events as they impact on the lives of ordinary people.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Drivers in Afghanistan brave 5,000 metre-high passes in freezing temperatures to deliver basic goods to the isolated inhabitants of the Wakhan corridor.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.title: Fault Lines
programme.desc: Fault Lines investigates the Trump administration's sweeping immigration crackdown, from courthouse arrests to deportations without due process.
programme.series-desc: Fault Lines, a documentary series produced and broadcast by Al Jazeera English, is the former's flagship program about the Americas and the latter's main investigative program. Josh Rushing, Zeina Awad, and Sebastian Walker host the series.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Risking it All
programme.desc: Drivers in Afghanistan brave 5,000 metre-high passes in freezing temperatures to deliver basic goods to the isolated inhabitants of the Wakhan corridor.
programme.series-desc:
Escaping the pressures of modern society proves to be an unforgettable and life-changing adventure as three families set out to live off the land. These families not only unplug their smartphones and tablets, but they also give up electricity and running water for a life off the grid in a drastic last resort to reconnect with each other. From attempting to save their marriage to dealing with family illness to regaining control of their relationships, each family has a different reason for embarking on the journey of a lifetime. The three families pack up their homes, say their good-byes to loved ones, and prepare for the challenges that come with trading in the luxuries of modern-day society for a self-sufficient life.
In a world where we have more forms of connection than ever before we tend to lose ourselves in the constant connectivity. “Risking It All” captures something many modern day families can relate to -- a strive and struggle to revisit building relationships and getting back to basics.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.
